=== Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Stockholm, Sweden
Globe Arena
October 11, 2003

Source:
Nice and clean recording by unknown artist x 2
Or the same taper just changing place !

Trade-dvdr/shn-MKW-flac-torrent
The Brilliant Tour Of 2003

CD1
1.Columbia Recording Artist
2.To Be Alone With You (Bob on piano) 
3.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue 
(Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Freddy on electric guitar, Tony on electric bass) 
4.Cry A While (Bob on piano) 
5.Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues (Bob on piano and harp) 
6.It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Bob on piano) 
7.Boots Of Spanish Leather (Bob on guitar) 
8.Things Have Changed (Bob on guitar) 
9.Highway 61 Revisited) (Bob on guitar and piano)* 
10.Love Sick (Bob on piano) 
11.Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano) 
12.Every Grain Of Sand (Bob on piano and harp) 

CD2
1.Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar) 
2.Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic)
(Bob on piano and harp, Tommy on acoustic guitar) 
3.Summer Days (Bob on guitar and piano, Tony on standup bass) 
4.(Encore) 
5.Cat's In The Well (Bob on piano) 
6.Introduction
7.Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano) 
8.Forever Young (Bob on piano and harp) 
9.All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano) 

The story:

*Two different sources, 2nd source starts track 9 disc 1
Or maybe its the same taper !!!
To make a long story short
Got this in trade 3 years ago as shorten files.
At that time had to promise not to seed it on internet until hi was finished with traditional trading
Well the time is up,and her it is !
I have better recordings than this !!!
So , This is for the collector,but its nice and clean !!
And it gives you a another perspective of the show.
